hero.description: Discover the features that make CucumberHTML the preferred reporter for engineering teams. Build trust through visibility.

precision.title: Precision at Scale
precision.description: Every detail engineered for developer productivity.

cards.title: Visual Analytics
cards.description: Transform raw test data into beautiful charts for pass/fail rates and trend analysis. Identify bottlenecks across releases with high-fidelity heatmaps.

cards.title: Deep Integration
cards.description: Full support for screenshots, video attachments, and custom metadata linked directly to failing steps.

cards.title: Searchable Reports
cards.description: High-performance filtering by status, tags, and duration. Find that flaky test in seconds.

developerFirst.title: Developer-First
developerFirst.description: Clean JSON transformation, CLI support, and easy CI integration. Built to fit into your existing workflow without friction.
developerFirst.code:
$ npm install cucumber-html
// Initialize report
reporter.generate({'{\n ... \n}'})

preview.title: Interactive Preview
preview.description: Experience the interface your stakeholders will see. High precision, low noise.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your reports?
cta.description: Join over 5,000 engineering teams delivering clearer BDD results every single day.
